banner.title: A cherished culinary haven where tradition meets innovation.
banner.subtitle: Kalpataru Grand — serving pure vegetarian food with quality ingredients, delightful flavors, and exceptional service in Tiptur, Karnataka.

philosophy.title: What makes Kalpataru Grand special.
philosophy.subtitle: Simple principles that guide everything we do — from ingredient sourcing to guest experience.

items.title: Quality First
items.description: Each dish is thoughtfully crafted with quality ingredients and authentic flavors that bring out the best in every cuisine we serve.

items.title: Pure Vegetarian
items.description: A 100% vegetarian kitchen — from breakfast to dinner, every dish respects vegetarian values without compromising on taste.

items.title: Inclusive Space
items.description: Fully wheelchair-accessible, family-friendly, and welcoming to everyone — from university students to tourists and groups.

items.title: Consistency
items.description: Over 5,300 reviews and a 4.1 rating — we deliver the same quality and taste with every visit, every dish, every day.

process.title: How a meal at Kalpataru Grand unfolds.
process.subtitle: From the moment you arrive to the last sip of filter coffee — every step is designed for your comfort.

steps.title: Easy access
steps.description: Plenty of free parking, wheelchair-accessible entrance, and a warm welcome at the door.

steps.title: Table or counter
steps.description: Table service on the first floor or quick counter service — pick what suits your schedule.

steps.title: Freshly prepared
steps.description: From dosas made on the tawa to thalis assembled fresh — every dish is prepared to order.

steps.title: Linger with coffee
steps.description: End your meal with our signature filter coffee or a cold milkshake. Take your time.

team.title: The people behind Kalpataru Grand.
team.subtitle: A dedicated team passionate about pure vegetarian food and exceptional hospitality.

members.name: Head Chef
members.bio: Specializing in South Indian breakfast and North Indian thalis, our head chef brings decades of experience in vegetarian cooking.

members.name: Service Manager
members.bio: Ensuring every guest — from walk-ins to large groups — has a seamless and memorable dining experience.
